---
format:
  html:
    body-classes: mf-home
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

::: {.mf-home-hero}
[Momentum First]{.mf-home-title}

A momentum-first framework for foundations, gravity, quantum structure, and cosmology.

[Start with the Preface](manuscript/chapters/00-front-matter/00-preface/){.mf-primary-link}
:::

::: {.mf-path-grid}
::: {.mf-path-card}
[**Tier 1 — Foundations**]{.mf-card-title}

Postulates, notation, and the momentum-first backbone.
:::

::: {.mf-path-card}
[**Tier 2 — Engines**]{.mf-card-title}

Gravity, quantum mechanics, and expansion as working framework engines.
:::

::: {.mf-path-card}
[**Appendices**]{.mf-card-title}

Derivations, calibration notes, and technical support for the main text.
:::
:::

::: {.mf-path-grid .mf-action-grid}
::: {.mf-path-card}
[**Latest PDF**]{.mf-card-title}

Download the current release snapshot as a PDF.

[Download PDF](https://github.com/ada-mercer/momentum-first/releases/latest/download/Momentum-First.pdf){.mf-card-link}
:::

::: {.mf-path-card}
[**Status and citation**]{.mf-card-title}

Pre-1.0 working manuscript. Cite the latest GitHub Release unless a more formal edition is provided.

[View releases](https://github.com/ada-mercer/momentum-first/releases){.mf-card-link}
:::

::: {.mf-path-card}
[**Source repository**]{.mf-card-title}

Open Quarto manuscript repository with source, figures, validation scripts, and release workflow.

[Open on GitHub](https://github.com/ada-mercer/momentum-first){.mf-card-link}
:::
:::

:::
